title: 1.1L Drinks Pitcher Jug Daisy Print Plastic Summer Picnic Outdoor Dining BBQ Pouring Spout Cork Lid
features: SUMMER: This stylish summer drinkware set includes one pitcher, four tumblers, and four wine goblets, making it a perfect addition to any indoor or outdoor gathering, whether for casual family meals or festive celebrations.

PITCHER: The pitcher, crafted from durable PS material, features a generous 1.1L capacity and an eye-catching daisy print, measuring 10cm in diameter and 20cm in height, ideal for serving refreshing drinks in style.

TUMBLER: Each tumbler is designed for convenience with a lightweight build of approximately 90g, a 365ml capacity, and dimensions of 9.3cm in height and 8.5cm in diameter, making them easy to handle and perfect for a variety of beverages.
GOBLET: The four elegant wine goblets stand 18.3cm tall with a 9cm diameter and hold 380ml, offering a sophisticated touch to your table setting while being durable enough for outdoor use.

DESIGN: Designed with both style and practicality in mind, this set is not suitable for microwave ovens or dishwashers, ensuring longevity with proper care while providing a charming and cohesive look for all your summer entertaining needs.
description: Product Description Tumbler, Goblet, Pitcher Set This stylish summer drinkware set includes one pitcher, four tumblers, and four wine goblets, making it an ideal choice for both casual family meals and festive outdoor celebrations. Whether you're hosting a barbecue, picnic, or garden party, this coordinated set brings convenience and charm to any occasion. Made from durable PS material, each piece is built to last while maintaining a lightweight feel for easy handling and transport during gatherings. Perfect for Summer The 1.1L pitcher features an eye-catching daisy print and measures approximately 10cm in diameter by 20cm in height, offering a fun way to serve cold beverages. The tumblers hold 365ml, weigh just 90g, and measure 9.3cm x 8.5cm, making them practical for daily use. The elegant 380ml wine goblets stand 18.3cm tall with a 9cm diameter, adding a sophisticated flair. For best results, hand wash only, as this set is not suitable for dishwashers or microwaves, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment.
